title: primula bellidifolia subsp. atricapilla
intro: Primula bellidifolia subsp. atricapilla is a subspecies of primrose, a flowering plant in the family Primulaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Primula bellidifolia subsp. atricapilla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. Primula bellidifolia subsp. atricapilla is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
